  • Module
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractRepository<T>
    Abstract base class for all repository classes.
    AddCategoryScreenController
    Controller for the Add Category screen.
    AddTransactionScreenController
    Controller for the Add Transaction screen.
    Category
    Represents a transaction category created by a user.
    Category.Builder
    Builder for creating Category instances.
    CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Repository for managing Category data in the database.
    CategoryService
    Handles business logic for category management.
    CategoryValidationException
    Thrown when category data fails validation.
    CategoryValidator
    Validates Category data before saving or updating.
    ChangePasswordScreenController
    Controller for the Change Password screen.
    ChartsScreenController
    Controller for the Charts screen.
    DatabaseConnection
    Utility class for establishing a connection to the database.
    DataIntegrityException
    Thrown when a database operation returns data in an inconsistent or unexpected state.
    DialogService
    Utility class for showing dialog boxes throughout the app.
    EditCategoryScreenController
    Controller for the Edit Category screen.
    EditTransactionScreenController
    Controller for the Edit Transaction screen.
    Entity
    Base class for all model entities.
    FinanceManagementSystemApplication
    Main entry point for the Finance Management System application.
    FinanceManagementSystemLauncher
     
    HomeScreenController
    Controller for the Home screen.
    ManageAccountScreenController
    Controller for the Manage Account screen.
    ManageCategoriesScreenController
    Controller for the Manage Categories screen.
    ManageTransactionsScreenController
    Controller for the Manage Transactions screen.
    MenuBarIncludeController
    Controller for the menu bar included on every screen.
    NumberValidator
    Utility class for parsing and validating numeric input.
    PasswordChangeException
    Thrown when a password change request fails validation.
    RepositoryAccessException
    Thrown when a database operation fails due to a connection or SQL error.
    SceneManager
    Utility class for navigating between screens in the app.
    ScreenLoadingException
    Thrown when a screen fails to load, usually due to a missing or invalid FXML file.
    SignUpScreenController
    Controller for the Sign-Up screen.
    TableUtils
    Utility class for building reusable TableView components.
    Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction made by a user.
    Transaction.Builder
    Builder for creating Transaction instances.
    TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Repository for managing Transaction data in the database.
    TransactionFilterForm
    Holds the filter criteria for searching transactions.
    TransactionFormIncludeController
    Base controller for screens that contain a transaction form.
    TransactionService
    Handles business logic for transaction management.
    TransactionType
    Represents the type of a financial transaction.
    TransactionValidationException
    Thrown when transaction data fails validation.
    TransactionValidator
    Validates Transaction data before saving or updating.
    User
    Represents a registered user of the application.
    User.Builder
    Builder for creating User instances.
    UserDatabaseRepository
    Repository for managing User data in the database.
    UserEditProfileForm
    Holds the form data for editing a user's profile.
    UserRegistrationForm
    Holds the form data for registering a new user.
    UserService
    Handles business logic for user management including registration, sign in, profile editing, password changes and account deletion.
    UserValidationException
    Thrown when user data fails validation.
    UserValidator
    Validates user input for registration, sign in, profile editing and password changes.
    WelcomeScreenController
    Controller for the Welcome screen.
